Source code for src.services.stripe_billing

"""Stripe Billing — Checkout, Customer Portal, webhook sync."""

from __future__ import annotations

import logging
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from typing import Any

import stripe
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session

from src.config import settings
from src.crud import tenant as tenant_crud
from src.models.tenant import Tenant
from src.utils.subscription import VALID_BILLING_INTERVALS, utcnow
from src.services.subscription_events import (
    EVENT_CHECKOUT_COMPLETED,
    EVENT_INVOICE_PAID,
    EVENT_INVOICE_PAYMENT_FAILED,
    EVENT_SUBSCRIPTION_CREATED,
    EVENT_SUBSCRIPTION_DELETED,
    EVENT_SUBSCRIPTION_UPDATED,
    EVENT_SYNC_FROM_STRIPE,
    record_subscription_event,
)

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

INTERVAL_TO_PRICE_SETTING = {
    "monthly": "STRIPE_PRICE_MONTHLY",
    "biannual": "STRIPE_PRICE_BIANNUAL",
    "annual": "STRIPE_PRICE_ANNUAL",
}

STRIPE_STATUS_TO_INTERNAL = {
    "active": "active",
    "trialing": "trialing",
    "past_due": "past_due",
    "canceled": "canceled",
    "unpaid": "canceled",
    "incomplete": "canceled",
    "incomplete_expired": "canceled",
    "paused": "canceled",
}




[docs]
def stripe_enabled() -> bool:
    return bool(settings.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and settings.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.strip())




def _configure_stripe() -> None:
    if not stripe_enabled():
        raise RuntimeError("Stripe is not configured.")
    stripe.api_key = settings.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY




[docs]
def price_id_for_interval(db: Session, interval: str) -> str:
    from src.crud.subscription_plan import stripe_price_id_for_interval

    if interval not in VALID_BILLING_INTERVALS:
        raise ValueError(f"Unknown billing interval: {interval}")
    price_id = stripe_price_id_for_interval(db, interval)
    if not price_id:
        raise ValueError(f"Stripe price not configured for {interval}")
    return price_id






[docs]
def interval_from_price_id(db: Session, price_id: str | None) -> str | None:
    from src.crud.subscription_plan import interval_from_stripe_price_id

    return interval_from_stripe_price_id(db, price_id)




def _frontend_base() -> str:
    if settings.APP_ENV == "development":
        return "http://localhost:3000"
    return settings.FRONTEND_URL.rstrip("/")




[docs]
def checkout_success_url() -> str:
    configured = (settings.STRIPE_SUCCESS_URL or "").strip()
    if configured:
        return configured
    return f"{_frontend_base()}/settings/subscription?checkout=success"






[docs]
def checkout_cancel_url() -> str:
    configured = (settings.STRIPE_CANCEL_URL or "").strip()
    if configured:
        return configured
    return f"{_frontend_base()}/settings/subscription?checkout=canceled"






[docs]
def portal_return_url() -> str:
    return f"{_frontend_base()}/settings/subscription?portal=return"




def _as_dict(obj: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Normalize Stripe objects / webhook payloads to plain dicts."""
    if obj is None:
        return {}
    if isinstance(obj, dict):
        return obj
    to_dict = getattr(obj, "to_dict_recursive", None) or getattr(obj, "to_dict", None)
    if callable(to_dict):
        return to_dict()
    return dict(obj)


def _event_type_and_object(event: Any) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
    if isinstance(event, dict):
        event_type = str(event.get("type") or "")
        data = event.get("data") or {}
        if isinstance(data, dict):
            return event_type, _as_dict(data.get("object"))
        return event_type, _as_dict(getattr(data, "object", None))
    event_type = str(getattr(event, "type", "") or "")
    data = getattr(event, "data", None)
    obj = getattr(data, "object", None) if data is not None else None
    return event_type, _as_dict(obj)


def _ts_to_datetime(ts: int | float | None) -> datetime | None:
    if ts is None:
        return None
    return datetime.fromtimestamp(float(ts), tz=timezone.utc)


def _subscription_period_bounds(sub: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[datetime | None, datetime | None]:
    """Resolve billing period dates from Stripe subscription (incl. trial and newer API shapes)."""
    status = sub.get("status")
    trial_start = sub.get("trial_start")
    trial_end = sub.get("trial_end")
    period_start = sub.get("current_period_start")
    period_end = sub.get("current_period_end")

    items = (sub.get("items") or {}).get("data") or []
    if items:
        first = _as_dict(items[0])
        period_start = period_start or first.get("current_period_start")
        period_end = period_end or first.get("current_period_end")

    if status == "trialing":
        start_ts = trial_start or period_start
        end_ts = trial_end or period_end
    else:
        start_ts = period_start
        end_ts = period_end

    return _ts_to_datetime(start_ts), _ts_to_datetime(end_ts)


def _tenant_subscription_snapshot(tenant: Tenant) -> tuple:
    period_end = tenant.period_end.isoformat() if tenant.period_end else None
    return (
        tenant.stripe_subscription_id,
        tenant.stripe_customer_id,
        tenant.subscription_status,
        period_end,
        tenant.billing_interval,
    )


def _tenant_by_stripe_customer(db: Session, customer_id: str) -> Tenant | None:
    return (
        db.query(Tenant)
        .filter(Tenant.stripe_customer_id == customer_id)
        .first()
    )


def _tenant_by_stripe_subscription(db: Session, subscription_id: str) -> Tenant | None:
    return (
        db.query(Tenant)
        .filter(Tenant.stripe_subscription_id == subscription_id)
        .first()
    )


def _tenant_from_metadata(db: Session, metadata: dict[str, Any] | Any | None) -> Tenant | None:
    meta = _as_dict(metadata)
    if not meta:
        return None
    tenant_id = meta.get("tenant_id")
    if not tenant_id:
        return None
    return tenant_crud.get_tenant(db, str(tenant_id))




[docs]
def get_or_create_stripe_customer(
    db: Session,
    tenant: Tenant,
    *,
    email: str,
    name: str | None = None,
) -> str:
    _configure_stripe()
    if tenant.stripe_customer_id:
        return tenant.stripe_customer_id

    customer = stripe.Customer.create(
        email=email,
        name=name or tenant.name,
        metadata={"tenant_id": tenant.id},
    )
    tenant.stripe_customer_id = customer.id
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(tenant)
    return customer.id






[docs]
def create_checkout_session(
    db: Session,
    tenant: Tenant,
    *,
    billing_interval: str,
    admin_email: str,
    admin_name: str | None = None,
) -> str:
    _configure_stripe()
    if tenant.is_platform:
        raise ValueError("Platform tenant cannot subscribe.")

    if tenant.stripe_subscription_id:
        sub = stripe.Subscription.retrieve(tenant.stripe_subscription_id)
        status = sub.get("status")
        if status in ("active", "trialing", "past_due"):
            raise ValueError(
                "An active Stripe subscription already exists. Use Manage billing instead."
            )

    customer_id = get_or_create_stripe_customer(
        db, tenant, email=admin_email, name=admin_name
    )
    price_id = price_id_for_interval(db, billing_interval)

    subscription_data: dict[str, Any] = {
        "metadata": {
            "tenant_id": tenant.id,
            "billing_interval": billing_interval,
        },
    }

    # Continue local trial on Stripe if still trialing without paid sub
    if (
        tenant.subscription_status == "trialing"
        and tenant.period_end
        and not tenant.stripe_subscription_id
    ):
        end = tenant.period_end
        if end.tzinfo is None:
            end = end.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
        if end > utcnow():
            subscription_data["trial_end"] = int(end.timestamp())
    elif not tenant.stripe_subscription_id and settings.STRIPE_CHECKOUT_TRIAL_DAYS > 0:
        subscription_data["trial_period_days"] = settings.STRIPE_CHECKOUT_TRIAL_DAYS

    session = stripe.checkout.Session.create(
        customer=customer_id,
        mode="subscription",
        line_items=[{"price": price_id, "quantity": 1}],
        success_url=checkout_success_url(),
        cancel_url=checkout_cancel_url(),
        client_reference_id=tenant.id,
        metadata={
            "tenant_id": tenant.id,
            "billing_interval": billing_interval,
        },
        subscription_data=subscription_data,
        allow_promotion_codes=True,
        payment_method_collection="always",
    )
    if not session.url:
        raise RuntimeError("Stripe did not return a checkout URL.")
    return session.url






[docs]
def create_portal_session(tenant: Tenant) -> str:
    _configure_stripe()
    if not tenant.stripe_customer_id:
        raise ValueError("No Stripe customer on file. Subscribe first.")
    session = stripe.billing_portal.Session.create(
        customer=tenant.stripe_customer_id,
        return_url=portal_return_url(),
    )
    if not session.url:
        raise RuntimeError("Stripe did not return a portal URL.")
    return session.url






[docs]
def cancel_subscription_at_period_end(tenant: Tenant) -> None:
    _configure_stripe()
    if not tenant.stripe_subscription_id:
        return
    stripe.Subscription.modify(
        tenant.stripe_subscription_id,
        cancel_at_period_end=True,
    )






[docs]
def reactivate_stripe_subscription(tenant: Tenant) -> None:
    _configure_stripe()
    if not tenant.stripe_subscription_id:
        return
    stripe.Subscription.modify(
        tenant.stripe_subscription_id,
        cancel_at_period_end=False,
    )






[docs]
def apply_stripe_subscription_to_tenant(
    db: Session,
    tenant: Tenant,
    subscription: dict[str, Any] | Any,
) -> Tenant:
    """Sync Stripe subscription object onto tenant row."""
    sub = _as_dict(subscription)

    sub_id = sub.get("id")
    status = sub.get("status")
    customer_id = sub.get("customer")
    cancel_at_period_end = sub.get("cancel_at_period_end", False)

    items = (sub.get("items") or {}).get("data") or []
    price_id = None
    if items:
        first = _as_dict(items[0])
        price = _as_dict(first.get("price"))
        price_id = price.get("id")

    metadata = _as_dict(sub.get("metadata"))
    # Portal plan changes update the price, not subscription metadata from checkout.
    interval = interval_from_price_id(db, price_id) or metadata.get("billing_interval")

    internal_status = STRIPE_STATUS_TO_INTERNAL.get(status, "canceled")

    tenant.stripe_subscription_id = sub_id
    if customer_id:
        tenant.stripe_customer_id = str(customer_id)
    tenant.plan = tenant.plan or "dose_unlimited"
    tenant.billing_interval = interval or tenant.billing_interval
    tenant.subscription_status = internal_status
    tenant.cancel_at_period_end = bool(cancel_at_period_end)
    period_start, period_end = _subscription_period_bounds(sub)
    tenant.period_start = period_start
    tenant.period_end = period_end

    if internal_status in ("active", "trialing", "past_due"):
        tenant.status = "active" if internal_status != "trialing" else "trial"
        if internal_status == "trialing":
            tenant.status = "trial"
        elif internal_status == "active":
            tenant.status = "active"
    elif internal_status == "canceled":
        tenant.status = "suspended"

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(tenant)
    return tenant






[docs]
def handle_webhook_event(
    db: Session,
    event: dict[str, Any] | Any,
    *,
    stripe_event_id: str | None = None,
) -> None:
    event_type, data_object = _event_type_and_object(event)

    logger.info("Stripe webhook: %s", event_type)

    if event_type == "checkout.session.completed":
        _handle_checkout_completed(db, data_object, stripe_event_id=stripe_event_id)
    elif event_type == "customer.subscription.created":
        _handle_subscription_upsert(
            db, data_object, stripe_event_id=stripe_event_id, created=True
        )
    elif event_type == "customer.subscription.updated":
        _handle_subscription_upsert(
            db, data_object, stripe_event_id=stripe_event_id, created=False
        )
    elif event_type == "customer.subscription.deleted":
        _handle_subscription_deleted(db, data_object, stripe_event_id=stripe_event_id)
    elif event_type == "invoice.paid":
        _handle_invoice_paid(db, data_object, stripe_event_id=stripe_event_id)
    elif event_type == "invoice.payment_failed":
        _handle_payment_failed(db, data_object, stripe_event_id=stripe_event_id)






[docs]
def sync_tenant_from_stripe(db: Session, tenant: Tenant) -> Tenant:
    """Pull latest Stripe subscription state onto tenant (post-checkout fallback)."""
    _configure_stripe()
    before = _tenant_subscription_snapshot(tenant)

    if tenant.stripe_subscription_id:
        sub = stripe.Subscription.retrieve(tenant.stripe_subscription_id)
        tenant = apply_stripe_subscription_to_tenant(db, tenant, sub)
    elif tenant.stripe_customer_id:
        subs = stripe.Subscription.list(
            customer=tenant.stripe_customer_id,
            status="all",
            limit=5,
        )
        synced = False
        for sub in subs.data:
            if sub.status in ("trialing", "active", "past_due"):
                tenant = apply_stripe_subscription_to_tenant(db, tenant, sub)
                synced = True
                break
        if not synced:
            raise ValueError("No active Stripe subscription found for this salon.")
    else:
        raise ValueError("No Stripe customer on file.")

    after = _tenant_subscription_snapshot(tenant)
    if before != after:
        record_subscription_event(
            db,
            tenant_id=tenant.id,
            event_type=EVENT_SYNC_FROM_STRIPE,
            source="stripe_sync",
            summary=f"Subscription synced from Stripe ({tenant.subscription_status}).",
            billing_interval=tenant.billing_interval,
            subscription_status=tenant.subscription_status,
        )
    return tenant




def _handle_checkout_completed(
    db: Session,
    session: dict[str, Any],
    *,
    stripe_event_id: str | None = None,
) -> None:
    session = _as_dict(session)
    tenant = _tenant_from_metadata(db, session.get("metadata"))
    if not tenant and session.get("client_reference_id"):
        tenant = tenant_crud.get_tenant(db, session["client_reference_id"])
    if not tenant:
        logger.warning("checkout.session.completed: no tenant matched")
        return

    customer_id = session.get("customer")
    subscription_id = session.get("subscription")
    if customer_id:
        tenant.stripe_customer_id = str(customer_id)
    if subscription_id:
        tenant.stripe_subscription_id = str(subscription_id)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(tenant)

    record_subscription_event(
        db,
        tenant_id=tenant.id,
        event_type=EVENT_CHECKOUT_COMPLETED,
        source="stripe_webhook",
        stripe_event_id=stripe_event_id,
        summary="Stripe Checkout completed — payment method saved.",
        billing_interval=tenant.billing_interval,
        subscription_status=tenant.subscription_status,
        details={
            "stripe_customer_id": tenant.stripe_customer_id,
            "stripe_subscription_id": tenant.stripe_subscription_id,
        },
    )


def _handle_subscription_upsert(
    db: Session,
    subscription: dict[str, Any],
    *,
    stripe_event_id: str | None = None,
    created: bool = False,
) -> None:
    subscription = _as_dict(subscription)
    tenant = _tenant_by_stripe_subscription(db, subscription.get("id", ""))
    if not tenant:
        tenant = _tenant_from_metadata(db, subscription.get("metadata"))
    if not tenant:
        customer_id = subscription.get("customer")
        if customer_id:
            tenant = _tenant_by_stripe_customer(db, str(customer_id))
    if not tenant:
        logger.warning("No tenant for subscription %s", subscription.get("id"))
        return
    apply_stripe_subscription_to_tenant(db, tenant, subscription)
    db.refresh(tenant)

    status = subscription.get("status")
    interval = tenant.billing_interval
    event_type = EVENT_SUBSCRIPTION_CREATED if created else EVENT_SUBSCRIPTION_UPDATED
    summary = (
        f"Stripe subscription {'created' if created else 'updated'} — status: {status}."
    )
    if tenant.cancel_at_period_end:
        summary += " Cancels at period end."

    record_subscription_event(
        db,
        tenant_id=tenant.id,
        event_type=event_type,
        source="stripe_webhook",
        stripe_event_id=stripe_event_id,
        summary=summary,
        billing_interval=interval,
        subscription_status=tenant.subscription_status,
        details={"stripe_subscription_id": subscription.get("id"), "status": status},
    )


def _handle_subscription_deleted(
    db: Session,
    subscription: dict[str, Any],
    *,
    stripe_event_id: str | None = None,
) -> None:
    subscription = _as_dict(subscription)
    tenant = _tenant_by_stripe_subscription(db, subscription.get("id", ""))
    if not tenant:
        return
    tenant.subscription_status = "canceled"
    tenant.status = "suspended"
    tenant.cancel_at_period_end = False
    tenant.stripe_subscription_id = None
    db.commit()

    record_subscription_event(
        db,
        tenant_id=tenant.id,
        event_type=EVENT_SUBSCRIPTION_DELETED,
        source="stripe_webhook",
        stripe_event_id=stripe_event_id,
        summary="Stripe subscription ended — salon access suspended.",
        subscription_status="canceled",
        details={"stripe_subscription_id": subscription.get("id")},
    )


def _handle_invoice_paid(
    db: Session,
    invoice: dict[str, Any],
    *,
    stripe_event_id: str | None = None,
) -> None:
    invoice = _as_dict(invoice)
    subscription_id = invoice.get("subscription")
    if not subscription_id:
        return
    tenant = _tenant_by_stripe_subscription(db, str(subscription_id))
    if not tenant:
        return

    amount = invoice.get("amount_paid")
    currency = invoice.get("currency")
    record_subscription_event(
        db,
        tenant_id=tenant.id,
        event_type=EVENT_INVOICE_PAID,
        source="stripe_webhook",
        stripe_event_id=stripe_event_id,
        summary="Invoice paid through Stripe.",
        amount_cents=int(amount) if amount is not None else None,
        currency=str(currency).upper() if currency else None,
        billing_interval=tenant.billing_interval,
        subscription_status=tenant.subscription_status,
        details={"invoice_id": invoice.get("id")},
    )


def _handle_payment_failed(
    db: Session,
    invoice: dict[str, Any],
    *,
    stripe_event_id: str | None = None,
) -> None:
    invoice = _as_dict(invoice)
    subscription_id = invoice.get("subscription")
    if not subscription_id:
        return
    tenant = _tenant_by_stripe_subscription(db, str(subscription_id))
    if not tenant:
        return
    tenant.subscription_status = "past_due"
    db.commit()

    record_subscription_event(
        db,
        tenant_id=tenant.id,
        event_type=EVENT_INVOICE_PAYMENT_FAILED,
        source="stripe_webhook",
        stripe_event_id=stripe_event_id,
        summary="Stripe invoice payment failed — subscription marked past due.",
        subscription_status="past_due",
        details={"invoice_id": invoice.get("id")},
    )
